riskFloorReasons: safety-invariant proximity: src/messaging/TelegramAdapter.ts matches Telegram adapter
migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)
new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: Per-item attention topics were the original design (right for genuine /ack-able to-dos); the flood guards only ever bounded BURSTS, so slow-drip alert sources (hours apart, distinct features) kept minting topics — latent since the attention queue was born, surfaced as ~317 junk topics and the 2026-07-09 operator directive (topic 11960).

classClosure.reason: caller-driven delivery-path routing inside the existing createAttentionItem funnel — not a new self-triggered controller/loop; emission is one hub message per item (replacing one TOPIC per item, a strict reduction), and hub creation is bounded create-once behind an in-flight-promise guard
